expectedAnswers: Yes, I've assigned Sarah to handle the weekly reports and Tom will manage the client follow-ups.
I've already arranged for my colleague to take over everything before I'm out.
Don't worry—I'll make sure everything is handed off properly.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明了交接对象和内容
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的职场词汇（assigned, handle, handed off）
表达自然度：符合英语母语者职场沟通习惯，无中式表达
关键词覆盖：包含 cover / hand over / take over 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Approved! Just send me the form.
content.speakerTextCn: 批准了！把申请表发我一下。
expectedAnswers: Perfect, I'll email it to you within 10 minutes.
Will do—thanks for the quick approval!
Sent! Let me know if you need anything else.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：立即确认行动并表达感谢，符合职场礼仪
语言准确性：使用了正确时态和自然短语（Will do, Sent!）
表达自然度：简洁、专业，符合英语职场快速回应习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 send / email / approved 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Can you confirm the handover is on track for next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能确认交接工作是否按计划进行吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I've scheduled a meeting with my replacement for Tuesday and shared all key files.
Everything is on schedule—I'll send you a summary by end of day.
I'm finalizing the documentation now and will confirm with you by Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回应确认请求，提供具体时间或行动
语言准确性：使用了完成时、将来时等正确时态，无语法错误
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合职场中层管理者沟通风格
关键词覆盖：包含 handover / on track / confirm / share / schedule 等核心词
